fields.label: Warehouse
fields.description: Select the warehouse to classify. Add one row per warehouse in your company.

fields.label: Purpose
fields.description: Inventory = usable on-hand stock (counts in F2). WIP = in-process stock (adds to WIP component of F2). Excluded = never counted — use for Scrap, Expiry, Wastage, QC Hold, Demo warehouses.

fields.label: Notes
fields.description: Optional: explain why this warehouse has this purpose. E.g. 'Scrap from VFFS Line 1' or 'QC Quarantine — stock not yet cleared'.
